product_overview: A self-service coffee kiosk web app that lets customers browse and customize menu items, pay via Midtrans, and view queue status; it also provides a Kitchen Display System for baristas to manage order lifecycles and an admin dashboard for operations.
core_goals: Start a new ordering session from the kiosk welcome screen
Browse product categories and view detailed product options
Customize products (size, toppings, variants) and add them to a session cart
Manage cart items, provide a customer name, and complete payment
Observe real-time order status updates on a public status board
Allow baristas to progress orders from pending to preparing to ready
Allow admins to authenticate and view sales overview and sync controls

features.name: Kiosk Welcome Screen
features.description: Entry point for customers to begin an ordering session and proceed to the menu.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See welcome screen with cafe branding -> Start an ordering session -> Navigate to /menu

features.name: Menu Browsing
features.description: Browse product categories and view product details and customization options before adding items to the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /menu -> View categories list and product grid -> Filter products by selecting a category -> Open product detail modal for a chosen product -> Select a size variant -> Select optional toppings or modifiers -> Add product to cart -> Navigate to /cart and verify the item with selected customizations is present

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Review and edit cart contents, enter a customer identifier, and proceed toward checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> View list of cart items with quantities and prices -> Increase or decrease an item quantity -> Remove an item from the cart -> Enter customer name (min 2 characters) -> Proceed to checkout -> Navigate to /checkout
Navigate to /cart -> Leave customer name empty -> Attempt to proceed to checkout -> See validation error about required customer name -> Enter a valid customer name -> Proceed to checkout

features.name: Checkout and Payment
features.description: Create an order and initiate the Midtrans payment flow, presenting a QR/checkout interface and confirming successful payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> See payment loading screen -> View Midtrans Snap payment widget or generated QR code -> Complete payment using QRIS or supported method -> After payment, navigate to /success and see order confirmation and queue number

features.name: Order Status Board
features.description: Public queue board that shows orders grouped by their current status with real-time updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /status -> View list of orders grouped by status (pending, preparing, ready) -> Observe real-time updates as orders change status

features.name: Kitchen Display System
features.description: Barista-facing dashboard to view incoming orders and update each order's lifecycle state; includes manual sync to Olsera POS.
user_flows: Navigate to /kitchen -> View pending and preparing orders in the queue -> Start preparing a pending order (order moves to preparing) -> Mark a preparing order as ready (order moves to ready) -> Trigger a manual sync with Olsera POS -> See a syncing indicator while sync runs

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated backoffice area for operational staff to view sales metrics and trigger syncs with Olsera POS.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Enter admin username and password -> Submit credentials -> On success, see sales overview and sync controls
Navigate to /admin -> Enter incorrect admin credentials -> Submit credentials -> See an authentication error message

routes.description: Kiosk welcome screen with "Tap to Order" button
Menu browsing page with product categories and product cards
Cart page showing selected items, quantities, customer name input, and checkout button
Checkout page that creates a payment via Midtrans and displays QR code
Order success confirmation page shown after payment
Status board showing queue of orders and their current status (pending, preparing, ready)
Kitchen Display System dashboard for baristas to manage and update order statuses
Admin dashboard with sales overview and sync controls

features.name: Kiosk Welcome Screen
features.description: Landing page with branding and a "Tap to Order" button to start ordering
user_interactions: View welcome screen with cafe branding
Click "Tap to Order" button to navigate to menu

features.name: Menu Browsing
features.description: Browse product categories (Coffee Based, Non-Coffee, etc.) and view product cards with images and prices
user_interactions: Click category buttons to filter products
Click a product card to open product detail modal
Select size variant (Small, Medium, Large/Regular)
Select optional toppings
Click "Add to Cart" to add product to cart

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: View cart items, adjust quantities, enter customer name, and proceed to checkout
user_interactions: View list of cart items with quantities and prices
Increase or decrease item quantity
Remove items from cart
Enter customer name (required, min 2 characters)
Click "Checkout" button to proceed
See validation error if customer name is missing

features.name: Checkout and Payment
features.description: Create an order and initiate Midtrans payment, showing QR code or payment form
user_interactions: See payment loading screen
View Midtrans Snap payment widget
Complete payment via QRIS or other method
Click manual retry button if payment widget fails to load

features.name: Order Status Board
features.description: Public status board showing all orders and their current status (pending, preparing, ready)
user_interactions: View list of orders grouped by status
See real-time updates via SSE streaming

features.name: Kitchen Display System
features.description: Barista dashboard to view pending/preparing orders and update their status
user_interactions: View pending orders in queue
Click to move order from pending to preparing
Click to move order from preparing to ready
Click "Sync Data" button to sync with Olsera POS
See "Syncing..." indicator during sync

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin login and dashboard with sales data and sync controls
user_interactions: Enter admin username and password
Click login button
View sales overview after login
See error message for incorrect credentials

known_limitations.issue: Payment gateway requires Midtrans sandbox credentials configured in environment
known_limitations.impact: Payment flow will fail without proper MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY and MIDTRANS_CLIENT_KEY
When enabled, auth checks are skipped to allow E2E testing
